title: Find Anyone
objective: Rack up the highest score in a 3-minute run by finding and tapping glowing Anyone orbs, chaining combos, and avoiding Scroll decoys that speed up the collapse into the feed.

controls.outcome: Collects it, refreshes combo time, and adds score.

controls.input: Do not tap red feed bubbles
controls.outcome: Keeps your focus meter stable and preserves multiplier.

controls.input: Tap highlighted orbiting orbs in the shown order
controls.outcome: Triggers a short score multiplier surge and clears nearby clutter.

steps: Neon library doors drift onto the screen and crack open into moving orbs.
Blue-white Anyone orbs are the real targets; red Scroll bubbles are decoys with a downward arrow telegraph.
Tap real targets before they fade to fill your combo and slow the feed meter.
Every few seconds, a bright Find Ring appears around 3 marked orbs; hit them in order for a temporary x2-x4 boost.
Miss too many real targets or tap too many Scroll bubbles and the feed meter fills, ending the run.
scoring: Each Anyone orb scores 10 points, with a combo multiplier rising from x1 to x5 for clean streaks. Completing a Find Ring grants a bonus burst and extends combo time. Leaderboard ranking is based on highest single-run raw
tips: Prioritize clearly marked Anyone orbs near the bottom where fade-outs happen first.
Break from easy taps when a Find Ring appears; its bonus is worth more than scattered singles.
Red Scroll bubbles punish panic tapping, so read the telegraph before committing.

trendContext.title: Anyone find themselves opening up their game libraries, staring at it for a couple of hours, then just giving up and going on social media?
